description: Ideal for those who prefer discrete, tonal Shooting socks below their breeks, or for extra warmth and support worn under your boots, the ribbed knit country sock is ideal for that extra layer of warmth and protection for those out in the field - in two packs giving you extra value and two great alternatives. Made from lambswool in combination with technical fibres for maximum performance. 40% Lambswool/40% Acrylic/20% Nylon Classic ribbed knit Contrast foldover Cushioned, articulated footbed Reinforced heel and toe panels
